---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# -----------------------------
# Input files
# -----------------------------
bracken_file <- "ALL.bracken.biom.txt"
mapping_file <- "ALL.mapping.txt"

ra_threshold <- 0.0001
prev_threshold <- 0.50

# -----------------------------
# Read files
# -----------------------------
bracken <- read_tsv(bracken_file)
mapping <- read_tsv(mapping_file)

# Remove QIIME type row from mapping
mapping <- mapping %>%
  filter(`#SampleID` != "#q2:types") %>%
  rename(SampleID = `#SampleID`)

# -----------------------------
# Convert Bracken counts to relative abundance
# taxa rows, samples columns
# -----------------------------
bracken_ra <- bracken %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTUID") %>%
  as.matrix()

bracken_ra <- sweep(bracken_ra, 2, colSums(bracken_ra, na.rm = TRUE), "/")

bracken_ra_long <- bracken_ra %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Taxon") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Taxon,
    names_to = "SampleID",
    values_to = "RelativeAbundance"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Merge with mapping
# -----------------------------
dat <- bracken_ra_long %>%
  inner_join(
    mapping %>% select(SampleID, Donor, Milieu, Tissue, Section),
    by = "SampleID"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Function to calculate core taxa
# -----------------------------
calculate_core <- function(data, section_name) {
  
  data %>%
    filter(Section == section_name) %>%
    group_by(Taxon) %>%
    summarise(
      n_samples = n(),
      n_present = sum(RelativeAbundance > ra_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
      prevalence = n_present / n_samples,
      mean_RA = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_RA = median(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(prevalence >= prev_threshold) %>%
    arrange(desc(prevalence), desc(mean_RA))
}

# -----------------------------
# Calculate small and large intestine core
# -----------------------------
small_core <- calculate_core(dat, "Small_intestine")
large_core <- calculate_core(dat, "Large_intestine")

# -----------------------------
# Save results
# -----------------------------
write_csv(small_core, "Small_intestine_core_RA0.0001_prev50.csv")
write_csv(large_core, "Large_intestine_core_RA0.0001_prev50.csv")

# Optional: taxa names only
write_lines(small_core$Taxon, "Small_intestine_core_taxa_only.txt")
write_lines(large_core$Taxon, "Large_intestine_core_taxa_only.txt")

small_core
large_core
```
# tissue core
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# -----------------------------
# Input files
# -----------------------------
bracken_file <- "ALL.bracken.biom.txt"
mapping_file <- "ALL.mapping.txt"

ra_threshold <- 0.0001
prev_threshold <- 0.50

# -----------------------------
# Read files
# -----------------------------
bracken <- read_tsv(bracken_file)
mapping <- read_tsv(mapping_file)

mapping <- mapping %>%
  filter(`#SampleID` != "#q2:types") %>%
  rename(SampleID = `#SampleID`)

# -----------------------------
# Convert counts to relative abundance
# -----------------------------
bracken_ra <- bracken %>%
  column_to_rownames("OTUID") %>%
  as.matrix()

bracken_ra <- sweep(
  bracken_ra,
  2,
  colSums(bracken_ra, na.rm = TRUE),
  "/"
)

bracken_ra_long <- bracken_ra %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("Taxon") %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Taxon,
    names_to = "SampleID",
    values_to = "RelativeAbundance"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Merge with mapping
# -----------------------------
dat <- bracken_ra_long %>%
  inner_join(
    mapping %>% select(SampleID, Donor, Milieu, Tissue, Section),
    by = "SampleID"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Calculate core taxa for each tissue
# -----------------------------
tissue_core <- dat %>%
  group_by(Tissue, Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_present = sum(RelativeAbundance > ra_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence = n_present / n_samples,
    mean_RA = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RA = median(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(prevalence >= prev_threshold,
    mean_RA >= ra_threshold) %>%
  arrange(Tissue, desc(prevalence), desc(mean_RA))

# -----------------------------
# Save one combined file
# -----------------------------
write_csv(
  tissue_core,
  "Tissue_core_RA0.0001_prev50.csv"
)

# -----------------------------
# Save taxa-only file for each tissue
# -----------------------------
dir.create("Tissue_core_taxa_only", showWarnings = FALSE)

tissue_core %>%
  group_by(Tissue) %>%
  group_walk(~ {
    write_lines(
      .x$Taxon,
      file.path(
        "Tissue_core_taxa_only",
        paste0(unique(.x$Tissue), "_core_taxa.txt")
      )
    )
  })

# View result
tissue_core
```

# accessesory taxa
between donors
```{r}
# -----------------------------
# Calculate core taxa for each donor
# -----------------------------
donor_core <- dat %>%
  group_by(Donor, Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_present = sum(RelativeAbundance >= ra_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence = n_present / n_samples,
    mean_RA = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RA = median(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    prevalence >= prev_threshold,
    mean_RA >= ra_threshold
  ) %>%
  arrange(Donor, desc(prevalence), desc(mean_RA))

write_csv(donor_core, "Donor_core_RA0.0001_prev50.csv")

donor_core_summary <- donor_core %>%
  group_by(Donor) %>%
  summarise(
    n_core_taxa = n_distinct(Taxon),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

donor_core_summary
write_csv(donor_core_summary, "Donor_core_summary.csv")

donor_accessory <- dat %>%
  left_join(
    donor_core %>%
      select(Donor, Taxon) %>%
      mutate(Community = "Core"),
    by = c("Donor", "Taxon")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Community = replace_na(Community, "Accessory"),
    Present = RelativeAbundance >= ra_threshold
  )

donor_accessory_summary <- donor_accessory %>%
  group_by(Donor, Community) %>%
  summarise(
    richness = n_distinct(Taxon[Present]),
    total_RA = sum(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Community,
    values_from = c(richness, total_RA),
    values_fill = 0
  )

donor_accessory_summary
write_csv(donor_accessory_summary, "Donor_core_accessory_summary.csv")
```


# caluclate cv and IQR of donor core taxa
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# -----------------------------
# thresholds
# -----------------------------
ra_threshold <- 0.0001
prev_threshold <- 0.50

# -----------------------------
# 1. Calculate prevalence + abundance across ALL samples
# -----------------------------
global_core_stats <- dat %>%
  group_by(Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    n_samples = n(),
    n_present = sum(RelativeAbundance >= ra_threshold, na.rm = TRUE),
    prevalence = n_present / n_samples,
    mean_RA = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_RA = median(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -----------------------------
# 2. Define global core taxa
# -----------------------------
global_core_taxa <- global_core_stats %>%
  filter(
    prevalence >= prev_threshold,
    mean_RA >= ra_threshold
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(prevalence), desc(mean_RA))

# -----------------------------
# 3. Extract taxa names
# -----------------------------
core_taxa_list <- global_core_taxa$Taxon

# -----------------------------
# 4. Save results
# -----------------------------
write_csv(global_core_taxa, "Global_core_taxa_stats.csv")

write_lines(
  core_taxa_list,
  "Global_core_taxa_list.txt"
)

# -----------------------------
# 5. Quick check
# -----------------------------
nrow(global_core_taxa)

core_presence_donor <- dat %>%
  filter(Taxon %in% core_taxa_list,
         RelativeAbundance >= ra_threshold) %>%
  group_by(Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    n_donors = n_distinct(Donor),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

core_presence_donor

# -----------------------------
# 6. Calculate donor-level mean RA for global core taxa
# -----------------------------
donor_taxon_core <- dat %>%
  filter(Taxon %in% core_taxa_list) %>%
  group_by(Donor, Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    donor_mean_RA = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# Check: each taxon should have multiple donors
donor_taxon_core %>%
  count(Taxon) %>%
  arrange(n)

# -----------------------------
# 7. Calculate CV and IQR across donors
# -----------------------------
core_variation <- donor_taxon_core %>%
  group_by(Taxon) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_RA = mean(donor_mean_RA, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_RA = sd(donor_mean_RA, na.rm = TRUE),
    CV = if_else(mean_RA > 0, sd_RA / mean_RA, NA_real_),
    median_RA = median(donor_mean_RA, na.rm = TRUE),
    IQR_RA = IQR(donor_mean_RA, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_donors = n_distinct(Donor),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(CV))

core_variation

write_csv(core_variation, "Global_core_taxa_CV_IQR_by_donor.csv")
```
# visualization

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# -----------------------------
# Prepare plotting data
# -----------------------------
plot_dat <- donor_accessory_summary %>%
  select(Donor, richness_Core, richness_Accessory) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(richness_Core, richness_Accessory),
    names_to = "Community",
    values_to = "Taxa_number"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Community = recode(
      Community,
      richness_Core = "Core taxa",
      richness_Accessory = "Accessory taxa"
    ),
    Community = factor(
      Community,
      levels = c("Core taxa", "Accessory taxa")
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# Floral colors
# -----------------------------
floral_colors <- c(
  "Core taxa" = "#F4A7B9",
  "Accessory taxa" = "#BFA2DB"
)

# -----------------------------
# Plot with labels
# -----------------------------
p <- ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = Donor, y = Taxa_number, fill = Community)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
  
  geom_text(
    aes(label = Taxa_number),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 4,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = floral_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Donor",
    y = "Number of taxa",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p

# -----------------------------
# Save
# -----------------------------
ggsave(
  "Donor_core_accessory_floral_labeled.png",
  p,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 600
)
```

## visulization for CV and IQR
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)

# -----------------------------
# Classify CV into stability groups
# -----------------------------
core_variation_plot <- core_variation %>%
  mutate(
    CV_class = case_when(
      CV < 0.5 ~ "Stable",
      CV >= 0.5 & CV < 1 ~ "Moderate",
      CV >= 1 & CV < 1.5 ~ "High",
      CV >= 1.5 ~ "Extreme",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    CV_class = factor(
      CV_class,
      levels = c("Stable", "Moderate", "High", "Extreme")
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# Floral Prism-style colors
# -----------------------------
cv_colors <- c(
  "Stable"   = "#B7D7A8",
  "Moderate" = "#F7C6C7",
  "High"     = "#F4A7B9",
  "Extreme"  = "#BFA2DB"
)

# -----------------------------
# Bubble plot: mean RA vs CV, bubble size = IQR


# -----------------------------
p_cv_iqr <- ggplot(
  core_variation_plot,
  aes(x = mean_RA, y = CV, size = IQR_RA, fill = CV_class)
) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.85,
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 12)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cv_colors, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "Mean relative abundance",
    y = "Coefficient of variation (CV)",
    size = "IQR",
    fill = "CV class"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_cv_iqr

label_dat <- core_variation_plot %>%
  arrange(desc(CV)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

p_cv_iqr_label <- p_cv_iqr +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = label_dat,
    aes(label = Taxon),
    size = 3.5,
    max.overlaps = Inf
  )

p_cv_iqr_label

ggsave(
  "Core_taxa_CV_IQR_bubble_plot.png",
 p_cv_iqr_label,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 600
)
```



## dot plot
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

segment_order <- c(
  "Duodenum",
  "Jejunum",
  "Ileum",
  "AscendingColon",
  "TransverseColon",
  "DescendingColon"
)

plot_dat <- tissue_core %>%
  filter(
    Tissue %in% segment_order,
    Taxon != "Homo sapiens"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Tissue = factor(Tissue, levels = segment_order),
    Taxon = fct_reorder(Taxon, mean_RA, .fun = max)
  )

library(scales)

library(scales)

p_dot <- ggplot(plot_dat, aes(x = Tissue, y = Taxon, color = mean_RA)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.9) +
  
  scale_color_gradientn(
    colors = c("#2C7BB6", "#FFFFBF", "#D7191C"),
    trans = "log10",
    
    # your custom breaks
    breaks = c(3e-02,1e-02, 3e-03, 1e-03, 3e-04),
    
    # 👇 force decimal display (no scientific notation)
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.0001, trim = TRUE)
  ) +
  
  labs(
    x = "Intestinal segment",
    y = "Core taxa",
    color = "Mean RA"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

p_dot
ggsave(
  "Segment_core_taxa_dotplot_color.png",
  p_dot,
  width = 7,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 600
)
```
